summary: Verified Tax Returns Archive collapsible section update. All 18 frontend E2E tests and 10 backend API tests passed. New features working: section starts collapsed, shows years with data count, displays 'Filed' and 'Has Income Data' badges, expand/collapse toggle works correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use year 2098 to avoid conflicts with production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Returns Archive collapsible section fully tested: 1) Section starts collapsed by default with isCollapsed state, 2) Header shows 'X years with data' count, 3) Only years with income data (gross_income > 0 or net_profit != 0) or uploaded tax returns are displayed, 4) Year badges: 'Filed' (green) for uploaded returns, 'Has Income Data' (blue) for income-only years, 5) Expand/collapse toggle (data-testid='tax-returns-archive-toggle') works correctly, 6) Upload, download, delete functionality still works within expanded years. All data-testid attributes present and working.

section_starts_collapsed.details: Tax Returns Archive section starts collapsed by default, year rows not visible until toggle clicked

header_shows_years_count.details: Section header shows 'X years with data' count (e.g., '3 years with data')

only_years_with_data_shown.details: Only years with income data or uploaded returns are displayed (2026, 2025, 2023 visible)

filed_badge_for_uploaded_returns.details: Years with uploaded tax returns show green 'Filed' badge (e.g., Tax Year 2023)

has_income_data_badge.details: Years with only income data show blue 'Has Income Data' badge (e.g., Tax Year 2026, 2025)

expand_collapse_toggle_works.details: Clicking toggle expands/collapses the section, year rows appear/disappear correctly

upload_download_delete_still_work.details: Upload, download, and delete functionality works within expanded years
